title: CreateListRequest
description: Request body for creating a new List.

content.description: The content description of the List.

due_date.description: Due date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

due_date_time.description: Whether the due date includes a time component.

priority.description: Priority level. 1 is Urgent, 2 is High, 3 is Normal, 4 is Low.

assignee.description: User ID to assign to the List.

status.description: The status to set on the List.
